summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NoMoreScamCalls app with Clerk authentication. All core UI features working correctly with one authentication routing issue identified.

authentication_issues.issue: Account page (/account) does not properly enforce authentication - shows blank content instead of redirecting to login
authentication_issues.expected_behavior: Should redirect unauthenticated users to sign-in page
authentication_issues.current_behavior: Shows blank page with header navigation only
authentication_issues.technical_details: The <SignedIn> wrapper in App.jsx route may not be working correctly for protecting the account route

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, features, and stats
Header navigation displays correctly (Home, Sign In, Get Started buttons)
Sign In button successfully opens Clerk modal
Sign Up/Get Started button successfully opens Clerk modal
All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes
Responsive design with mobile menu functionality
Clerk integration working with development keys
All feature cards (3) and stat cards (4) display correctly
success_percentage: 87% - Frontend UI and Clerk modals working perfectly, minor authentication routing issue
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix account page authentication routing - the /account route should redirect unauthenticated users to sign-in instead of showing blank content. Check SignedIn wrapper implementation in routing.
